subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the One True Object of all desire, Who through the tokens of His Pen hath subdued the realms of earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود یکتا را لایق و سزا که بآثار قلمش عالم ملک و ملکوت را مسخر فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
